ticket_recommendations.title: The generated bootstrap contract cannot ready this repo on the current machine, so write-capable workflow stages can deadlock before source fixes start
ticket_recommendations.summary: Prefer repo-native bootstrap (`uv sync --locked` for uv repos; otherwise repo-local `.venv` plus `.venv/bin/python -m pip`), record missing prerequisites accurately, and keep bootstrap readiness separate from source import/test failures.

ticket_recommendations.title: One or more Python packages fail to import — the service cannot start
ticket_recommendations.summary: Verify every import succeeds: `python -c 'from src.<pkg>.main import app'`. Use string annotations (`-> "TypeName"`) for TYPE_CHECKING-only imports. Use `request: Request` (not `app: FastAPI`) in FastAPI dependency functions.

ticket_recommendations.title: pytest cannot collect tests — at least one test file has an import or syntax error
ticket_recommendations.summary: Run `pytest tests/ --collect-only` and fix all collection errors before marking QA done. A QA artifact that claims tests passed when pytest cannot even collect is invalid.

ticket_recommendations.title: Repo-local model operating surfaces are missing or still pinned to deprecated MiniMax defaults
ticket_recommendations.summary: Regenerate `.opencode/skills/model-operating-profile/SKILL.md`, align provenance/model-matrix/agent frontmatter on the current runtime model choices, and remove deprecated `MiniMax-M2.7` surfaces before implementation continues.

ticket_recommendations.title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text instead of project-specific guidance
ticket_recommendations.summary: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
